info.description: API Server for Your Persona psychological assessment platform.
info.title: Your Persona API

get.description:
Checks connectivity to PostgreSQL and Redis, the two dependencies used synchronously
by nearly every endpoint. Used by container orchestration / load balancers.

503.description: One or more dependencies are unreachable — see data.checks

post.description:
Starts a 14-day grace period. The account remains fully usable during this window —
use `/account/delete-request/cancel` any time before the grace period ends to abort.

Once the grace period elapses, a background worker anonymizes personal data
(email, display name, essay answers, AI summary) and deletes stored PDFs.
Aggregate data (mbti_type, grit_score) is retained.

409.description: DELETION_ALREADY_REQUESTED — an active request already exists

post.description:
Aborts an in-progress grace period — only works while the request is still
`pending_grace`. Once the anonymization worker has started, it's too late to cancel.
post.summary: Cancel a pending account deletion request

patch.description:
Updates `display_name`/`age`/`status`/`preferred_locale` — send only the fields you want to change.
Used both to change locale from settings and to complete a profile for members who
registered without ever having a `GUEST_SESSION`.

400.description: VALIDATION_ERROR — an included field has an invalid value

get.description:
Returns the caller's referral code, generating and persisting one on the very first request.
Subsequent calls always return the same code — one code per user, never rotated.

post.description:
Guest-or-Member endpoint (Auth: Optional). Member identity is taken from the Bearer
access token if present (set by AuthMiddleware.OptionalAuth); otherwise falls back to
the `session_id` Guest cookie. Runs the AI analysis synchronously — expect 3-8s latency.

parameters.description: Client-generated UUIDv4, replayed to dedupe retries
parameters.name: Idempotency-Key

400.description: VALIDATION_ERROR — missing Idempotency-Key, malformed body, or neither session_id cookie nor access token present

409.description: IDEMPOTENCY_KEY_REUSED — same key replayed with a different payload

423.description: LOCK_NOT_ACQUIRED — a submission for this identity is already in flight

post.description:
Changes the password of the currently logged-in account by verifying `old_password`.
`retry_new_password` must exactly match `new_password`.

On success:
- ALL existing sessions on every device are revoked (same as `/auth/reset-password`).
- A fresh `access_token` + `refresh_token` pair is returned for THIS device so the caller isn't logged out.

The new password follows the same policy as registration: minimum 10 characters and
checked against known breach databases.

parameters.description: Old password, new password, and confirmation
parameters.name: request

200.description: Password changed. New session issued for this device.

401.description: UNAUTHORIZED | INVALID_CREDENTIALS — access token invalid, or old_password is incorrect

post.description:
Sends a 6-digit password reset OTP to the given email address.

**Anti-enumeration:** this endpoint ALWAYS returns the same generic 200 response,
whether or not the email is registered. Do not use it to probe for accounts.

**Rate limiting:** 60-second cooldown + max 5 requests per 24 hours per email
(separate budget from `/auth/resend-email-otp`). When throttled, the response
includes `meta.retry_after_seconds`.

Flow: `/forgot-password` → `/verify-reset-otp` → `/reset-password`.

**cf_turnstile_response** — required. The token returned by the Cloudflare Turnstile
widget after the user completes the challenge.
post.summary: Request a password reset OTP (step 1 of 3)

200.description: Generic response — OTP sent if the email is registered

400.description: VALIDATION_ERROR | TURNSTILE_VERIFICATION_FAILED — email missing, or bot verification failed

post.description:
Authenticates a registered and verified member account.
Returns a short-lived `access_token` (JWT) and a long-lived `refresh_token`.

**Account lockout:**
After **10 consecutive failed attempts**, the account is temporarily locked for **15 minutes**.
The locked response includes `meta.locked_until` (RFC 3339 timestamp) indicating when the
lock expires. Attempting to log in during a lockout will continue returning HTTP 423.

The email must be verified before login is permitted.

**cf_turnstile_response** — required. The token returned by the Cloudflare Turnstile
widget after the user completes the challenge.

200.description: Login successful. Use access_token as Bearer token.

400.description: VALIDATION_ERROR | TURNSTILE_VERIFICATION_FAILED — email/password missing, or bot verification failed

401.description: INVALID_CREDENTIALS — email or password is incorrect

403.description: EMAIL_NOT_VERIFIED — account email is not yet verified

423.description: ACCOUNT_LOCKED — account is temporarily locked. Check meta.locked_until.

429.description: RATE_LIMITED — too many login attempts from this IP (separate from ACCOUNT_LOCKED). Check meta.retry_after_seconds.

post.description:
Terminates the CURRENT session: the provided `refresh_token` is revoked and can no longer
be exchanged for new access tokens. The current access token simply expires on its own
(≤15 minutes). Other devices/sessions stay logged in — use `/auth/logout-all` to revoke everything.

Logout is idempotent: an already-expired refresh token still returns 200.

parameters.description: Refresh token of the session being terminated
parameters.name: request

401.description: UNAUTHORIZED | TOKEN_VERSION_MISMATCH — access token invalid, or refresh token belongs to another account

post.description:
Revokes EVERY session of the account by incrementing the internal token version.
All previously issued access AND refresh tokens become invalid on their next use,
including the one used to call this endpoint.

Exchanges a valid `refresh_token` for a brand-new `access_token` + `refresh_token` pair.
The presented refresh token is **rotated**: it is revoked immediately after the exchange
and cannot be used a second time.

Returns `TOKEN_VERSION_MISMATCH` when the session was revoked by logout-all or a
password reset — the client must redirect the user to login.

Creates a new member account. If a valid `session_id` cookie from `/v1/guest-session`
is present, the guest session data (display name, age, status, locale) is automatically
linked to the new account — you do NOT need to re-submit that data here.

After successful registration, a 6-digit OTP is sent to the provided email address.
The account is not fully active until the OTP is verified via `/v1/auth/verify-email-otp`.

**preferred_locale** — accepted values:
- `en` — English
- `id` — Indonesian (Bahasa Indonesia)

**referral_code** — completely optional.
If you do not have a referral code, omit the field, set it to `null`, or send `""` — all three are treated identically.

**cf_turnstile_response** — required. The token returned by the Cloudflare Turnstile
widget after the user completes the challenge.

201.description: Account created. OTP sent to email. Verify via /auth/verify-email-otp.

409.description: EMAIL_ALREADY_REGISTERED — email is already in use

429.description: RATE_LIMITED — too many registration attempts from this IP. Check meta.retry_after_seconds.

post.description:
Generates a new 6-digit OTP and sends it to the provided email address,
invalidating any previously issued OTP for that address.

**Rate limiting:**
- There is a **60-second cooldown** between resend requests.
- Maximum **5 resend requests per 24 hours** per email address.
- When rate limited, the response includes `meta.retry_after_seconds` indicating how long to wait.

For security reasons, this endpoint returns HTTP 200 regardless of whether the email
address is registered, to prevent email enumeration attacks.

parameters.description: Email address to resend OTP to
parameters.name: request

200.description: OTP sent (or silently skipped if email is not registered)

400.description: VALIDATION_ERROR — email field is missing or invalid

429.description: RATE_LIMITED — cooldown active or daily limit reached. Check meta.retry_after_seconds.

post.description:
Changes the account password using the single-use `reset_token` from `/auth/verify-reset-otp`.

On success:
- The `reset_token` is consumed permanently (replaying it returns 401).
- ALL existing sessions on every device are revoked.
- A fresh `access_token` + `refresh_token` pair is returned (auto-login).

The new password follows the same policy as registration: minimum 10 characters and
checked against known breach databases.

401.description: UNAUTHORIZED — reset_token invalid, expired, or already used

post.description:
Verifies the 6-digit OTP sent to the user's email address after registration.
The account is fully active only after this step succeeds.

On success, a fresh `access_token` + `refresh_token` pair is returned (auto-login) —
you already proved the password (at registration) and email ownership (this OTP),
so a separate `/auth/login` call right after would be redundant.

**Attempt limits:**
- Maximum **5 wrong attempts** per OTP code. After that, you must request a new OTP.
- Each failed attempt returns the remaining attempt count in the `meta.attempts_remaining` field.

**OTP expiry:** OTP codes expire after 10 minutes. Request a new one via `/auth/resend-email-otp`.

429.description: OTP_MAX_ATTEMPTS — maximum wrong attempts exceeded. Request a new OTP.

post.description:
Exchanges a valid reset OTP for a short-lived (~15 minutes) single-use `reset_token`.
Pass that token to `/auth/reset-password` to actually change the password.

**Attempt limits:** maximum 5 wrong attempts per OTP; then a new code must be requested
via `/auth/forgot-password`. Failed attempts return `meta.attempts_remaining`.

429.description: OTP_MAX_ATTEMPTS — request a new OTP via /auth/forgot-password

post.description:
Starts an anonymous onboarding session before the user registers an account.
Sets a `session_id` HttpOnly cookie that is automatically carried through to `/auth/register`
to link the guest session to the new account.

**status** — accepted values:
- `student`    — currently studying at school or university
- `worker`     — employed full-time or part-time
- `freelancer` — self-employed / project-based work
- `unemployed` — not currently working
- `other`      — anything that does not fit the options above

**locale** — accepted values:
- `en` — English (UI labels and email content will be in English)
- `id` — Indonesian (UI labels and email content will be in Bahasa Indonesia)

201.description: Guest session created. session_id cookie is set.

400.description: VALIDATION_ERROR — one or more fields are missing or have an invalid value (e.g., unrecognised status or locale)

get.description: Returns the full SJT/Likert/Essay question bank translated to the negotiated locale.

parameters.description: Overrides the negotiated locale for this request (en|id)
parameters.name: locale

get.description:
Optional auth. Anyone holding the result's (unguessable) ID can view it.
`is_owner` tells the frontend whether to render owner-only affordances.

patch.description: Owner only. Purely visual — never affects trait_scores/grit_score/ai_summary_text.

400.description: VALIDATION_ERROR — mascot_style must be style_a or style_b

403.description: FORBIDDEN — caller does not own this result

get.description: Owner only. Redirects (302) to a short-lived signed URL once the PDF is ready.

403.description: FORBIDDEN — caller does not own this result

get.description:
Owner only. Frontend polls with exponential backoff (2s→4s→8s→cap 10s, ~90s total);
`failed` means stop polling immediately.

403.description: FORBIDDEN — caller does not own this result

get.description:
Member's personal dashboard: remaining monthly quota (derived on-the-fly), recent GRIT trend,
and rule-based micro_insights (no Gemini call — locale-aware INSIGHT_TEMPLATE lookups only).
This is the USER (Member) dashboard — not an admin dashboard; this API has no admin concept.

BearerAuth.description: Masukkan access token tanpa prefix "Bearer ", cukup token JWT-nya saja.
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
